query: SELECT c.id, c.name, c.email, c.cpf, c.role, c.managedProgramId, c.programId, c.canLogin FROM consultors c WHERE c.role = 'gerente'; SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.role, u.alunoId, u.consultorId, u.programId FROM users u WHERE u.role = 'manager'
